text: Monitor AI-specific and open-source funding calls for a genuinely eligible Q4 opportunity
description: Maintain a monthly, source-verified scan of German/EU AI and open-source funding that is actually open and structurally eligible. Current July 2026 result: no better individual AI-specific grant is open for Aimparency. SPRIND Next Frontier AI closed 1 June and funds frontier-model research rather than an application/tool layer; the former BMWE Gründungswettbewerb is not currently continued; many BMFTR AI calls require companies/research consortia or are already closed. Watch: new SPRIND challenges, BMFTR software/AI calls, KMU-innovativ IKT after a legal entity exists, EIC Open at greater maturity, and NLnet's regular open calls when they reopen after summer. Never treat a search listing as open until the official call page confirms deadline and eligibility.

status.comment: Initial July scan complete: Prototype Fund remains the strongest individual route. Recheck official sources monthly in Q4.
